name: github_create_installation_access_token
description: POST /app/installations/{installation_id}/access_tokens — create installation access token (1h). Requires JWT. Optional repositories, repository_ids, permissions.

installation_id.description: The unique identifier of the installation.

repositories.description: Repository names the token should access (up to 500).

repository_ids.description: Repository IDs the token should access (up to 500).

permissions.description: Subset of app permissions for the token.
